headlines.title: Spencer Pratt says he doesn’t need ‘anyone’s endorsement’ after Trump backs L.A. mayor bid
headlines.description: Former reality TV star and Los Angeles mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt rebuffed a potential endorsement from President Donald Trump, telling NBC News on Thursday, “I don’t need anyone’s endorsement but mothers’.

headlines.title: DOJ opens criminal probe involving E. Jean Carroll testimony in Trump sexual abuse lawsuit
headlines.description: The Justice Department has opened a criminal investigation involving E. Jean Carroll’s lawsuits over her sexual abuse allegations against President Donald Trump, according to two sources familiar with the matter

headlines.title: Trump administration prepares for proposed $250 bill with the president’s face on it
headlines.description: The Treasury Department is preparing to print $250 bills with President Donald Trump’s face on them and is just waiting for Congress’ green light, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Thursday

headlines.title: L.A. mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt accuses Karen Bass of 'criminal negligence'
headlines.description: Los Angeles mayoral candidate and former reality TV star Spencer Pratt sits down with NBC News' Tom Llamas to discuss his campaign, in which he accuses Mayor Karen Bass and Governor Gavin Newsom of "criminal negligence" over their handling of the devastating L.A. wildfires.

headlines.title: DOJ investigation into E. Jean Carroll’s Trump lawsuit
headlines.description: The Justice Department is opening an investigation into writer E. Jean Carroll’s civil lawsuits against the president, according to two sources familiar with the matter. The probe is not focused on Carroll, but a trust founded by a billionaire Democratic donor who funded Carroll’s lawsuits. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: Negotiators for U.S. and Iran reach deal
headlines.description: An official tells NBC News that negotiators for the U.S. and Iran have reached a deal to end the war. That official tells us it’s just waiting for a signoff from President Trump and from Iranian leaders. NBC News’ Richard Engel has the story.

headlines.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’
headlines.description: Vance said in an interview with NBC News he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s home targeted in apparent swatting incident
headlines.description: An apparent “swatting” incident targeted Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s home Wednesday night, police in Virginia said Thursday.

headlines.title: AI is moving fast. 2028 hopefuls will be forced to adapt: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Jonathan Allen explores how presidential contenders from both parties will need to grapple with ever-shifting AI issues ahead of 2028.

headlines.title: Americans who get Ebola will go to Europe for treatment, not U.S., officials say
headlines.description: If additional Americans contract Ebola and need medical care, they will be sent to Europe rather than brought home to the U.S., senior administration officials said.

headlines.title: White House has yet to release health results from Trump’s doctor after latest checkup
headlines.description: The White House has yet to release any results from President Donald Trump’s medical and dental exams at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center this week.
